mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel_kiosk.pricing_policy (policy_name, repeat_type, repeat_value, start_date, end_date, discount_rate) VALUES (#{policyName}, #{repeatType}, #{repeatValue}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{discountRate})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM hotel_kiosk.pricing_policy ORDER BY policy_id DESC
Select * FROM pricing_policy WHERE policy_name != '요일 정책' ORDER BY policy_id DESC
SELECT * FROM pricing_policy WHERE repeat_type = 'Weekly' AND policy_name = '요일 정책' ORDER BY policy_id DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE hotel_kiosk.pricing_policy
policy_name = #{policyName},
repeat_type = #{repeatType},
repeat_value = #{repeatValue},
start_date = #{startDate},
end_date = #{endDate},
discount_rate = #{discountRate},
WHERE policy_id = #{policyId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM pricing_policy WHERE repeat_type = #{repeatType} AND #{date} BETWEEN start_date AND end_date
SELECT * FROM pricing_policy WHERE repeat_type = 'Weekly' AND FIND_IN_SET(#{day}, repeat_value) ORDER BY policy_id DESC LIMIT 1
